issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
Skill file contains additional explanatory text beyond concise instructions.

scenarios.name: Admin list+complete processing orders via REST
scenarios.rationale: Baseline crafts raw HTTP basic-auth requests with often-wrong endpoint shapes; treatment imports @woocommerce/woocommerce-rest-api, instantiates with consumerKey/consumerSecret and version wc/v3, then uses woo.get('orders', { status: 'processing' }) and woo.put with the documented signature.

scenarios.name: Add checkout delivery notes + bulk discount
scenarios.rationale: Baseline edits theme templates or recommends a plugin; treatment hooks woocommerce_after_order_notes with woocommerce_form_field for the textarea and woocommerce_cart_calculate_fees calling $cart->add_fee('Bulk discount', -10) gated on get_subtotal() > 100.
